title: AoA Armor Icon Fix
description: Make Armor icons of AoA same as armor itself!
body:
# 🛡Description
This pack makes armor icons of AoA looks same as you are wearing!
## ⛑️Supported Armors
  - Ice
  - Lyonic
  - Skeletal
  - Rockbone
  - Subterranean
  - Predatious
  - Utopian
  - Baron
  - Necro
  - Phantasm
  - Alacrity
  - Lyndamyte
  - Archaic
  - Embrodium
  - Nethengeic

---
